EN16931.blocker: Official schematron artefacts not yet compiled. See docs/OFFICIAL_ARTEFACT_SYNC.md.

PEPPOL-BIS-3.0.blocker: Official schematron artefacts not yet compiled. See docs/OFFICIAL_ARTEFACT_SYNC.md.

XRECHNUNG-3.0.blocker: Official schematron artefacts not yet compiled. See docs/OFFICIAL_ARTEFACT_SYNC.md.

rate_limiting.blocker: RATE_LIMITER binding must be added to wrangler.toml and Cloudflare dashboard. See docs/RATE_LIMITING.md.

api_key_provisioning.blocker: Stripe + Cloudflare KV integration required for self-serve provisioning. See docs/API_KEY_PROVISIONING.md.

billing.blocker: Stripe webhook handler and metered billing not implemented. See docs/BILLING_ARCHITECTURE.md.

secrets.blocker: VALID_API_KEYS must be migrated to wrangler secret put before production deployment. See docs/PRODUCTION_SECRETS.md.

blockers.title: EN16931 schematron not integrated
blockers.description: Only 7 of 128+ EN16931 rules implemented. Official CEN/TC 434 schematron artefacts must be compiled.

blockers.title: PEPPOL BIS 3.0 schematron not integrated
blockers.description: PEPPOL-specific rules (network IDs, GLN, routing) not implemented. Only 7 shared base rules active.

blockers.title: XRechnung 3.0 CIUS not integrated
blockers.description: XRechnung-specific rules (Leitweg-ID, German B2G requirements) not implemented.

blockers.title: Rate limiting binding not configured
blockers.description: RATE_LIMITER binding absent — any valid API key can make unlimited requests.

blockers.title: No metered billing
blockers.description: No Stripe integration — cannot collect revenue or enforce usage caps.

blockers.title: Manual API key provisioning only
blockers.description: Self-serve signup not possible — keys issued manually.

blockers.title: VALID_API_KEYS in wrangler.toml [vars]
blockers.description: Dev placeholder in committed [vars]. Must use wrangler secret put before production.

go_no_go.cloudflare_deploy: CONDITIONAL_GO — set VALID_API_KEYS via wrangler secret put first
